title: Shopping cart total skips first item
visible_tests:
from source import Item, calculate_total

def test_total_single_item():
    items = [Item(10)]
    assert calculate_total(items) == 10
from source import Item, calculate_total

def test_total_empty():
    assert calculate_total([]) == 0
hidden_tests:
from source import Item, calculate_total

def test_total_multiple():
    items = [Item(10), Item(20), Item(30)]
    assert calculate_total(items) == 60
from source import Item, calculate_total

def test_total_includes_first():
    items = [Item(99), Item(1)]
    assert calculate_total(items) == 100

ground_truth.bug_description: Loop starts at index 1 instead of 0, skipping the first item in the list.

title: User registration always returns None
visible_tests:
from source import create_user

def test_create_valid_user():
    user = create_user('alice', 'alice@example.com')
    assert user is not None
    assert user.username == 'alice'
from source import create_user

def test_create_invalid_user():
    user = create_user('', 'test@example.com')
    assert user is None
hidden_tests:
from source import create_user

def test_user_is_active():
    user = create_user('bob', 'bob@test.com')
    assert user.active is True
from source import create_user

def test_user_email_stored():
    user = create_user('carol', 'carol@test.com')
    assert user.email == 'carol@test.com'

ground_truth.bug_description: The create_user function creates a User object but never returns it. The function implicitly returns None.

title: Age verification allows minors

ground_truth.bug_description: verify_age uses '>' instead of '>=', so exactly 18-year-olds are rejected even though 18+ should be allowed.

title: Full name formatter adds extra spaces
visible_tests:
from source import format_name

def test_full_name_with_middle():
    assert format_name('John', 'Michael', 'Doe') == 'John Michael Doe'
from source import greet

def test_greet_with_name():
    result = greet('Jane', 'Marie', 'Smith')
    assert result == 'Hello, Jane Marie Smith!'
hidden_tests:
from source import format_name

def test_name_without_middle():
    result = format_name('John', '', 'Doe')
    assert result == 'John Doe'
from source import format_name

def test_no_double_spaces():
    result = format_name('A', '', 'B')
    assert '  ' not in result

ground_truth.bug_description: When middle name is empty string, join() includes it creating a double space like 'John  Doe' instead of 'John Doe'.

title: Average calculator crashes on empty list

ground_truth.bug_description: calculate_average divides by len(numbers) without checking for empty list, causing ZeroDivisionError.
